**What & why**

**Checklist**

- [ ] `pnpm lint && pnpm typecheck && pnpm test && pnpm build` passes locally
- [ ] Tests added/updated for behavior changes
- [ ] No secrets, client identifiers, or real personal data in code, fixtures,
      or docs (`gitleaks detect` is clean)
- [ ] Does not add auto-merge, weaken trust-tier enforcement, or expand
      default data capture (see CONTRIBUTING.md — these are hard rules)
